info.title: PDF/UA API
info.description: HTML to PDF/A-3a conversion API with PDF/UA accessibility support and veraPDF validation

get.description: Returns the health status of the API. Always accessible without authentication.

post.description: Renders HTML to a PDF/A-3a + PDF/UA document, or a JSON validation response when Accept is application/json.

parameters.name: X-Upload-Url
parameters.description: Presigned PUT URL that receives the generated document.

200.description: PDF document or JSON validation response

400.description: Invalid request, empty HTML, or JSON/upload conflict

502.description: Upload target rejected the request or was unreachable

post.description: Renders a JSON template to a PDF/A-3a document, or a JSON validation response when Accept is application/json.

parameters.name: X-Upload-Url
parameters.description: Presigned PUT URL that receives the generated document.

data.description: Per-block content overrides, keyed by block id. Object for most blocks; array of row objects for tables.

200.description: PDF document or JSON validation response

400.description: Invalid template, data, request, or JSON/upload conflict

502.description: Upload target rejected the request or was unreachable

post.description: Fetches the HTML at the given URL and renders it to a PDF, or a JSON validation response when Accept is application/json.

parameters.name: X-Upload-Url
parameters.description: Presigned PUT URL that receives the generated document.

200.description: PDF document or JSON validation response

400.description: Invalid URL, fetch failure, or JSON/upload conflict

502.description: Upload target rejected the request or was unreachable

post.description: Renders HTML to a PNG or JPEG image, or uploads it when X-Upload-Url is provided.

parameters.name: X-Upload-Url
parameters.description: Presigned PUT URL that receives the generated document.

502.description: Upload target rejected the request or was unreachable

post.description: Validates a PDF against PDF/A-3a and PDF/UA-1 standards using veraPDF. Send PDF binary as request body.
Checks whether a PDF was produced by this API and returns its document UUID if found.

400.description: PDF content is empty or invalid

fonts.description: External fonts keyed by font family name.

src.description: HTTP, HTTPS, or base64 data URI for an image or PDF page background.

family.description: Bundled or external font family key.

weight.description: Font weight; one of the FontWeight enum values.

align.description: Text alignment for this typography scope.

color.description: CSS color value used for text.

blockConfig.title: BlockConfig

width.description: CSS width for this block, such as 50%, 80mm, or auto.

align.description: Horizontal placement of this block within its row cell.

blockConfig.tsType: { typography?: TypographyConfig; spacing?: SpacingConfig; width?: string | null; align?: Align | null }

id.description: Stable block identifier used for runtime data overrides.

thickness.description: Rule thickness as a CSS length, such as 1pt or 2px.

id.description: Stable block identifier used for runtime data overrides.
Stable block identifier used for runtime data overrides.
Stable block identifier used for runtime data overrides.

src.description: Public image URL, SVG markup, or uploaded image data URL.

alt.description: Alternative text for screen readers and PDF accessibility.

maxHeight.description: Maximum rendered height as a CSS length, such as 60px or 20mm.

id.description: Stable block identifier used for runtime data overrides.
Stable block identifier used for runtime data overrides.

height.description: Vertical space as a CSS length, such as 5mm or 12px.

key.description: Runtime data key used for this table column.

label.description: Header label rendered for this table column.

align.description: Text alignment for this table column.

width.description: Column width as a CSS width value, such as 20mm or 15%.

id.description: Stable block identifier used for runtime data overrides.
Stable block identifier used for runtime data overrides.

pageConfig.title: PageConfig
pageConfig.tsType: { size?: PageSize; locale?: string; margins?: SpacingConfig; pageNumbers?: PageNumbersConfig; background?: PageBackgroundConfig | null; footer?: PageFooterConfig }

templateConfig.title: TemplateConfig

title.description: Document title. Used as the PDF document title, which PDF/UA requires.

embedColorProfile.description: Embed the PDF/A ICC color profile. Disable only for PDF/UA-without-PDF/A output.

templateConfig.tsType: { title?: string; page?: PageConfig; typography?: TypographyConfig; embedColorProfile?: boolean }

weight.description: One or more whitespace-separated FontWeight values, e.g. "400" or "400 700".
